Title: Define the first target user
Description: Internal use for the current business. This keeps the MVP focused on operations instead of a customer portal.
Label: Product Definition

Title: Define the first service types
Description: Confirm the initial service catalog: dog walk, pet sitting at client home, home-style boarding, and visit/check-in.
Label: Product Definition

Title: Define service completion states
Description: Define what done means for a service: scheduled, confirmed, assigned, completed, charged, and paid.
Label: Product Definition

Title: Define local-first data requirements
Description: Decide which data must work locally and which data must be exportable.
Label: Product Definition

Title: Define MVP exclusions
Description: Keep customer app, online payments, marketplace, and automated public booking out of the first version.
Label: Product Definition

Title: Design Household model
Description: Use Household as the main grouping unit instead of owner to support partners, domestic workers, family members, and shared care contexts.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design Contact model
Description: Support roles such as owner, partner, domestic worker, family member, payer, and emergency contact.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design contact-household relationships
Description: Allow many-to-many links between contacts and households.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design Pet model
Description: Link pets to households and avoid rigid owner assumptions.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design pet care profile
Description: Store diet, food schedule, medicine, allergies, behavior notes, and vet notes.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design Booking model
Description: Represent scheduled services such as walks, visits, sitting, and boarding.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design CareTask model
Description: Represent reminders such as food, medicine, walks, cleaning, and photo updates.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design Charge model
Description: Represent work that should be paid after services are completed.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design Payment model
Description: Allow one payment to cover multiple charges, pets, or households, and allow payer to be any contact.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Design Conversation and Message records
Description: Store imported WhatsApp or Telegram context linked to detected requests and bookings.
Label: Core Data Model

Title: Build today's work dashboard
Description: Show the operational day view as the main app screen.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Show scheduled services and care tasks
Description: Show walks, visits, boarding stays, and care tasks in the daily dashboard.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add household creation
Description: Create households manually in the MVP.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add contact creation
Description: Create contacts manually and link them to households.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add pet creation
Description: Create pets manually and link them to households.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add booking creation
Description: Create bookings manually before automation exists.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add recurring care tasks
Description: Support recurring reminders for feeding, medicine, cleaning, and walks.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add booking statuses
Description: Support requested, confirmed, in progress, completed, and cancelled states.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add staff assignment
Description: Assign each booking to a walker or sitter.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Add notes to bookings and pets
Description: Support operational notes per booking and persistent care notes per pet.
Label: Internal Operations MVP

Title: Generate charges from completed services
Description: Create charges when services are completed.
Label: Payments

Title: Register manual payments
Description: Track cash, transfer, and other payment methods without processing payments.
Label: Payments

Title: Allow payment from any contact
Description: Do not require the payer to be the owner of the pet.
Label: Payments

Title: Apply one payment to multiple charges
Description: Support payments that cover multiple services, pets, or households.
Label: Payments

Title: Support partial payments
Description: Allow a charge to be partially paid.
Label: Payments

Title: Show payment states
Description: Show unpaid, partially paid, and paid charges.
Label: Payments

Title: Show balance by household
Description: Calculate outstanding balance by household.
Label: Payments

Title: Show payment history by contact
Description: Show historical payments grouped by payer/contact.
Label: Payments

Title: Build manual message import screen
Description: Allow pasting WhatsApp or Telegram messages into the app.
Label: Message Capture

Title: Parse pasted messages
Description: Extract possible service requests from pasted WhatsApp or Telegram text.
Label: Message Capture

Title: Detect scheduling details
Description: Detect possible date, time, pet names, service type, and contact.
Label: Message Capture

Title: Build detected request review screen
Description: Review detected requests before creating real bookings.
Label: Message Capture

Title: Support detected request decisions
Description: Allow confirming, editing, ignoring, or asking for more information.
Label: Message Capture

Title: Store original message text
Description: Link the original message text to the detected request.
Label: Message Capture

Title: Add confidence states
Description: Flag ambiguous detected requests instead of assuming correctness.
Label: Message Capture

Title: Build calendar view
Description: Support day, week, and month views.
Label: Calendar And Reminders

Title: Add care reminders
Description: Create reminders for food, medicine, pickups, drop-offs, and walks.
Label: Calendar And Reminders

Title: Add overdue task state
Description: Show overdue care tasks clearly.
Label: Calendar And Reminders

Title: Add completed task state
Description: Track task completion.
Label: Calendar And Reminders

Title: Add staff daily checklist
Description: Give staff a focused list of work and care tasks for the day.
Label: Calendar And Reminders

Title: Explore calendar export or sync
Description: Evaluate external calendar export or sync after core scheduling works.
Label: Calendar And Reminders

Title: Prototype Telegram ingestion
Description: Test a Telegram bot workflow for receiving messages.
Label: Automation

Title: Prototype n8n workflow
Description: Test n8n message capture and handoff to Pawsear.
Label: Automation

Title: Investigate WhatsApp Business API
Description: Research API requirements, limits, and costs.
Label: Automation

Title: Choose WhatsApp automation approach
Description: Decide whether to start with manual import, n8n, or official API.
Label: Automation

Title: Add automation queue
Description: Collect unreviewed detected requests in one queue.
Label: Automation

Title: Add audit log
Description: Track automated changes and their source messages.
Label: Automation

Title: Export data as JSON
Description: Export households, contacts, pets, bookings, charges, and payments as JSON.

Description: Export operational reports as CSV.
Label: Reports And Export

Description: Allow full local database export.
Label: Reports And Export

Title: Export backup bundle as ZIP
Description: Create a backup bundle for portability.
Label: Reports And Export

Title: Build completed work report
Description: Report completed work by date range.
Label: Reports And Export

Title: Build unpaid work report
Description: Report unpaid or partially paid work.
Label: Reports And Export

Title: Build staff workload report
Description: Report workload by staff member.
Label: Reports And Export

Title: Prepare for multiple businesses
Description: Keep architecture ready for multiple businesses in the future.
Label: Future Expansion

Title: Keep staff roles flexible
Description: Support walkers and sitters without assuming one fixed role.
Label: Future Expansion

Title: Keep service area fields available
Description: Leave room for future location-based matching.
Label: Future Expansion

Title: Avoid marketplace assumptions
Description: Do not let marketplace needs complicate the internal MVP.
Label: Future Expansion

Title: Research marketplace later
Description: Only research marketplace requirements after internal workflow works well.
